profile.name: Bharath Lakkoju
profile.summary: Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience architecting scalable web applications and integrating AI-driven predictive analytics. Proficient in React, Next.js, Redux, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB, with a proven track record of reducing API latency by 40% and increasing user engagement by 60%. Adept at CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and cross-functional Agile collaboration to deliver high-performance, responsive platforms aligned with IoT and data automation objectives.

experience.title: Developer I
bullets: Architected and deployed a full-stack health tracking application using React Native, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, implementing a reward system that increased user engagement by 60% and improved data intake by 98%.

Engineered a scalable Angular and Node.js microservices architecture with WCS data integration, deploying an automated digitization banner that reduced manual processing overhead by 75% and streamlined RESTful API workflows.
Developed and integrated an AI-powered chatbot leveraging predictive analytics and LLM APIs, boosting monthly active users by 40% and enhancing real-time customer support capabilities.

Spearheaded the migration of legacy Java Spring services to Node.js and NestJS microservices, establishing API security standards, implementing comprehensive unit testing, and improving system maintainability by 35%.

Collaborated with cross-functional product and design teams in Agile sprints, conducting rigorous code reviews and optimizing CI/CD pipelines to achieve 99% deployment uptime and accelerate feature delivery.

projects.name: SalaryWise
projects.tech: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript / JSX, Vercel
bullets: Web app for job seekers to explore and compare salary benchmarks across roles (Frontend, Backend, fullstack, Data, DevOps), companies, and Indian cities
SEO-optimized blog with editorial salary insights and career advice articles
Sitemap and robots.txt configuration for search engine visibility
Google AdSense monetization integration (ads.txt)
Fast, minimal UI focused on readability and quick lookups

projects.name: SwiftMedia
projects.tech: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Framer Motion, Vercel
bullets: Privacy-first, browser-based media processing suite — all conversions happen client-side with zero server uploads
Image compression tool supporting JPEG, PNG, and WebP with quality control
Video compression powered by FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly, running fully in-browser
PDF compression to reduce file sizes for sharing
PDF merger to combine multiple PDFs into a single document
Image-to-PDF converter supporting multiple images at once
Pages for DMCA, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Service

projects.name: FaviConverter
projects.tech: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Vercel
bullets: Browser-native favicon toolkit — all image conversion runs client-side with zero file uploads
Image-to-favicon converter (PNG/JPG/SVG → .ico + multi-size PNG set)
SVG-to-favicon and SVG-to-ICO dedicated converters
General favicon generator with live preview
Auto-generates a .zip bundle containing all required favicon sizes (16×16, 32×32, 48×48, 180×180, etc.)
SEO-focused guide pages: how to set up favicons in Next.js App Router and React/Vite
Tutorial article on how to create a favicon from scratch

projects.name: CalCalorie
projects.tech: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Vercel
bullets: Calorie calculator that computes TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) based on age, weight, height, gender, and activity level
Macro calculator that breaks daily calorie targets into protein, carbohydrate, and fat grams
Educational content explaining BMR vs TDEE concepts
Blog with articles tailored to an Indian audience: calorie deficit, muscle-gain foods, BMR vs TDEE explained
FAQ page covering common nutrition tracking questions
Dark mode toggle via next-themes
Medical disclaimer and privacy policy pages
SEO-optimized sitemap and robots configuration

projects.name: Flatmate
projects.tech: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth), Drizzle ORM, Zustand, OpenRouter AI Integration, shadcn/ui, Base UI, Framer Motion, Vitest + Testing Library, Playwright (E2E)
bullets: Full-stack shared living management app with Supabase authentication (email + OAuth)
Expense tracker for splitting and logging household costs between flatmates
Collaborative grocery list with per-flatmate item assignment and check-off
Meal planner with OCR-powered receipt scanning (Tesseract.js) for automatic meal logging
Task manager for assigning and tracking household chores
Shared household calendar for events and reminders
Google Gemini AI integration for intelligent household suggestions
Per-user profile and household settings pages
Unit test suite (Vitest + Testing Library) and end-to-end tests (Playwright)

projects.name: ATS Precision
projects.tech: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Supabase SSR + supabase-js, Drizzle ORM, Zustand, Framer Motion, Zod, Radix UI
bullets: Deterministic ATS resume evaluator — scores a resume against a specific job description using a weighted algorithm
Supports PDF and DOCX resume uploads, parsed entirely on the server
ATS scoring engine with weighted breakdown across keyword match, skills alignment, section completeness, and formatting quality
Keyword gap analysis highlighting missing critical terms and overused filler phrases
Section-by-section feedback for Summary, Experience, Skills, and Education
Role-specific improvement suggestions ranked by impact
Download evaluation report as PDF via jspdf + html2canvas
Animated marketing landing page and evaluation flow (Framer Motion)
Supabase-ready auth scaffolding for evaluation history persistence

projects.name: Waigenie.tech
projects.tech: Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Auth.js (NextAuth v5), Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Zustand, shadcn/ui, Razorpay, Node.js
bullets: Full-stack SaaS platform for Waigenie Tech — an AI-powered software testing toolkit aimed at QA engineers and development teams

5 AI testing tools in a protected dashboard: IdeaForge (test ideas), AutoScribe (test script generation), CucumberCraft (Gherkin/BDD), DomDetective (DOM locator extraction with live browser view), and WebTrekker (AI web agent)
Tech stack: Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Auth.js v5, Prisma + PostgreSQL, Zustand, shadcn/ui, Razorpay
Credit-based billing with Razorpay payment integration — users buy credits to run AI tools; full create/verify payment API built in
Full auth system — email/password (with strength indicator), Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, and password reset flow
Complete SaaS shell — marketing site, per-product landing pages, pricing page, consultation booking, legal pages (privacy, terms, cancel-refund), and multi-currency pricing support

awards: Deployed 8+ full-stack web and mobile applications serving 100+ active users with 75% uptime
Increased user engagement by 60% through innovative reward system implementation
Reduced operational costs by 75% through automated digitization banner component
Led frontend team of interns, mentoring on best practices and ensuring project delivery
Achieved 95% accuracy in AI-powered insurance recommendation system

suggestions.title: Quantify documentation contributions
suggestions.detail: Add metrics to documentation efforts, such as the number of documents created or the impact on developer onboarding.

suggestions.title: Detail distributed systems experience
suggestions.detail: Provide specific examples of designing, building, or operating distributed systems, highlighting challenges and solutions.

suggestions.title: Emphasize system monitoring experience
suggestions.detail: Describe any experience with system monitoring tools, incident response, or on-call responsibilities, even if in a different context.

suggestions.title: Tailor summary to Azure Storage
suggestions.detail: Adjust the professional summary to directly address Azure Storage and block storage concepts, showcasing relevant skills.

suggestions.title: Add keywords from job description
suggestions.detail: Incorporate keywords like 'technical documentation', 'API specifications', and 'operation procedures' naturally within relevant experience bullets.

suggestions.title: Showcase reliability and resilience
suggestions.detail: Highlight projects where you focused on improving system reliability, resilience, or performance under high load.

suggestions.title: Quantify Cloud Storage Experience
suggestions.detail: Add metrics and details about your experience with cloud storage solutions, emphasizing scale and performance.

suggestions.title: Highlight On-Call/Monitoring Experience
suggestions.detail: Describe any experience you have with monitoring systems, responding to incidents, and participating in on-call rotations.

suggestions.title: Showcase Documentation Skills
suggestions.detail: Include examples of technical documentation, API specifications, or operational procedures you have created.

suggestions.title: Emphasize Distributed Systems Experience
suggestions.detail: Provide more details about your experience designing and building large-scale distributed systems, focusing on the challenges you addressed.

suggestions.title: Tailor Resume to Azure Storage
suggestions.detail: Incorporate keywords related to Azure Storage and block storage to better align with the job description.

suggestions.title: Add DRI-related experience
suggestions.detail: If you have acted as a DRI or similar role, add details about your responsibilities and accomplishments.
